prompt: Photorealistic overhead photograph of premium 650gsm business cards with a unique cornerstone-inspired design, displayed on a dark concrete surface. The cards are standard rectangular format (90mm x 55mm). The card background is deep charcoal black with an extremely subtle dark grey stone texture pattern embossed across the entire card surface — barely visible fine chisel marks and masonry joint lines creating a hewn stone block texture. The LK logo is centred: a pentagon shape (rectangle with chamfered top-right corner) containing 'LK' in Playfair Display serif with carved embossed effect, rendered in warm gold hot foil stamping (hex #C9A96E), with 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in tracked uppercase below. The embossed stone texture across the card surface echoes the cornerstone masonry language of the logo. The reverse card shows contact details in gold centred on the card, exactly reading: 'Lyda Kieng' (name, slightly bolder weight), 'Designer | Project Manager' (title with pipe separator), '0401 061 246' (phone number), 'Po Box 583 Prospect East SA 5082' (postal address), 'lyda@lkdesignandbuild.com.au' (email). The same subtle embossed stone texture is visible on the back. Four cards arranged with architectural precision, two showing front and two showing back. Shot on 50mm macro lens at f/3.5, even studio lighting, tack sharp focus, product photography, dark premium atmosphere. Match the dark premium card aesthetic and gold foil quality visible in the reference image.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright colours, cluttered, glossy, low quality, deformed, white background, rounded corners, colourful, busy, too many decorations, wrong text, placeholder text
